title: How long did Asuka live with who
display_title: How long did Asuka live with who
wikitext:
[]: How long did Asuka live with who?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 27, 2007 8:07 pm According to both Episodes 22' and 08, Asuka lived with Kaji and Misato for a while. For instance, in 22', Asuka states how "Misato was the person who lived with her before Kaji-san in Germany.", so for how long was that for with each person? And she DID live with Father and Stepmother for some time after Kyoko's death (Asuka was about 4 or so, IIRC), right? I know this is irrelevant, but I am curious about this. (Same with what happens when in Asuka's childhood flashbacks Chronological-wise.)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Oct 27, 2007 8:59 pm I don't know if Misato "lived" with her before Kaji; I think they were just her "handler" at "work" but she could have lived at home.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Oct 27, 2007 10:06 pm V wrote: I don't know if Misato "lived" with her before Kaji; I think they were just her "handler" at "work" but she could have lived at home.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Oct 27, 2007 11:16 pm I believe Asuka disapproved of Misato being too "affected". Though she overtly disapproved of Misato's relationship with Kaji, I rather suspect that was the part Asuka wondered/wished about.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Oct 28, 2007 1:30 am this seems like something to be in the Discussion Catagory. i always thought that after College, Misato went straight to work at Nerv. Even though it states in ep 1 and 2 that She was STILL getting used to getting around at Nerv. and that she had just moved in to her Aparment. but she obviously had been working for Nerv for a while and possibly Geherin (i forget). but she was in Germany for a little bit obviously, according to Asuka. you know what? this is a good question! im going to post this in another thread!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Oct 28, 2007 8:30 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe Asuka disapproved of Misato being too "affected". Though she overtly disapproved of Misato's relationship with Kaji, I rather suspect that was the part Asuka wondered/wished about.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 28, 2007 1:57 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Do you suppose that what is being implied here is that Misato was putting on her phony bonhomie act around Asuka, and that she saw thru it just like Shinji did?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Oct 28, 2007 9:23 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Do you suppose that what is being implied here is that Misato was putting on her phony bonhomie act around Asuka, and that she saw thru it just like Shinji did?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Oct 28, 2007 10:12 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Do you suppose that what is being implied here is that Misato was putting on her phony bonhomie act around Asuka, and that she saw thru it just like Shinji did?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 31, 2007 4:58 pm So, back at the original topic, does anybody have an idea of how long Asuka lived with Misato or Kaji? Or is it possible that in both cases, they just watched over her when she was at NERV-Germany, and she lived with her father and stepmother??

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:05 pm werent Kaji and Misato just Asukas handlers (lol, makes her sound like a wild animal....well, i geuss she kinda is) and Asuka lived with her Father and Stepmother

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:10 pm the impression I get from the evidence is that she didn't really "live" with either of them; they were here personal assistant/direct supervisor while she was at Nerv-03, but she went home to her father and stepmother at the end of the day

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:23 pm I see. That actually makes more sense that anything else, really.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:52 pm Yeah....Hmm, I wonder if Misato helped Asuka with her Post-Calc and other college stuff or if she was studying with her herself +O

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:56 pm probably not they would've mentioned it in the show

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:18 pm ahhhh, true. Misato's and Ritsuko's past would've also shown Asuka with a marilyn monroe skirt getting chased by the college seniors everywhere with electric fans or something.
